title: Loop Creation & Management
description: Create seamless loops to extend breakdowns, build tension, or give yourself time to prepare the next track.

steps.instruction: Watch: the track plays into a break. The loop-in point is set at the start of a 4-bar phrase.
Watch: 4 bars later, the loop-out is set. The track now loops seamlessly between those two points.
Watch: the loop plays indefinitely. The energy builds. When ready, exit the loop and the track continues.

phases.instruction: A loop is like a highlight reel on repeat. You pick the best 4 bars of the breakdown and replay them until the moment is right. The crowd thinks you are holding tension on purpose — because you are.

steps.instruction: Play a track on Deck A. Find a section you want to loop — a 4-bar phrase with a clear rhythm.
When the phrase starts, press Cue to mark your loop-in point. Timing matters — aim for the downbeat.
Count out 4 bars — 16 beats. When the phrase completes, press Cue again to set your loop-out point.
The loop is now active. Let it play for 8 bars. Listen — does it sound seamless or can you hear the join?
Exit the loop by pressing Play. The track continues from the loop-out point naturally.
Good. Loops work best when set exactly on phrase boundaries. If you hear a glitch or click, your out-point was slightly off — try again.
